source_note: node source[] paths are relative to Best/opencode/ (monorepo root), e.g. packages/core/src/session/runner/llm.ts. From this wiki dir the source is ../../../opencode/.
staleness: opencode is a real git repo; node updated: records opencode HEAD short SHA at fill time

tiers.T1: surface — 模型/用户/集成可见面

variants.v1: legacy live path — packages/opencode/src, Vercel-AI-SDK based (SessionPrompt→SessionProcessor→LLM.stream)
variants.v2: new core — packages/core/src, namespace @opencode/v2, Effect-native durable/event-sourced (mostly built, runner not yet default)
variants.na: not part of the V1/V2 split (clients, infra, peripheral)

org_decision: hybrid: one node per concept with internal V1/V2 sections; split to -v1/-v2 only where implementations truly diverge (session core, tool system, permissions, shell, patch, compaction). Coverage: full monorepo same depth.
